name: Anthro Sawsbuck
description:
Office Worker POV

You're a simple office worker, currently just trying to make it through the days. It's your day off, and you decided to go on a walk in the park. Your coworker had the same idea, and you awkwardly run into each other.

Hey, y'all. Hope you have fun with this tired, awkward, overworked deer. I'm sure some of you relate.

creator: The Game Lord
